description: This file defines a MySQL repository module for managing bookmarks stored in the 'multiverse_bookmarks' table. It includes functions to upsert, delete, and list bookmarks with specific filtering and sorting logic. The functions interface directly with the database via the 'dbQuery' method.

methods.name: upsertBookmark({ userId, bookmarkType, bookmarkKey, payload = null })
methods.description: Inserts or updates a bookmark record in the database with given user ID, bookmark type, key, and optional payload, updating timestamps accordingly.

methods.name: deleteBookmark({ userId, bookmarkType, bookmarkKey })
methods.description: Deletes a specific bookmark entry based on user ID, bookmark type, and key; returns a success status.

methods.name: listBookmarks({ userId, bookmarkType = null, limit = 200, offset = 0 })
methods.description: Retrieves a list of bookmarks for a specified user, optionally filtered by bookmark type, sorted by recent updates, with pagination support.

methods.name: _safeJsonParse(v)
methods.description: Helper function to safely parse JSON strings into objects, returning null on failure or if input is null.

ctags.name: deleteBookmark
ctags.pattern: /^export async function deleteBookmark({ userId, bookmarkType, bookmarkKey }) {$/

ctags.name: listBookmarks
ctags.pattern: /^export async function listBookmarks({ userId, bookmarkType = null, limit = 200, offset = 0 }) {$/

ctags.name: upsertBookmark
ctags.pattern: /^export async function upsertBookmark({ userId, bookmarkType, bookmarkKey, payload = null }) {$/
